argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const id = '{{ id }}'; const strip = (html) => (html || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').replace(/ /g, ' ').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>').replace(/&/g, '&').trim(); const resp = await fetch('/ajax/statuses/show?id=' + encodeURIComponent(id), {credentials: 'include'}); if (!resp.ok) return [{ field: 'error', value: 'HTTP ' + resp.status }]; const s = await resp.json(); if (!s.ok && !s.idstr) return [{ field: 'error', value: 'Post not found' }]; let fullText = s.text_raw || strip(s.text || ''); if (s.isLongText || s.is_long_text) { try { const ltResp = await fetch('/ajax/statuses/longtext?id=' + s.idstr, {credentials: 'include'}); if (ltResp.ok) { const lt = await ltResp.json(); if (lt.data?.longTextContent) fullText = strip(lt.data.longTextContent); } } catch {} } const u = s.user || {}; const result = []; result.push({ field: 'author', value: u.screen_name || '' }); result.push({ field: 'comments', value: String(s.comments_count || 0) }); result.push({ field: 'created_at', value: s.created_at || '' }); result.push({ field: 'id', value: s.idstr || String(s.id) }); result.push({ field: 'likes', value: String(s.attitudes_count || 0) }); result.push({ field: 'mblogid', value: s.mblogid || '' }); result.push({ field: 'pic_count', value: String(s.pic_num || 0) }); result.push({ field: 'reposts', value: String(s.reposts_count || 0) }); result.push({ field: 'source', value: strip(s.source || '') }); result.push({ field: 'text', value: fullText }); result.push({ field: 'url', value: 'https://weibo.com/' + (u.id || '') + '/' + (s.mblogid || '') }); if (s.retweeted_status) { const rt = s.retweeted_status; result.push({ field: 'retweeted_from', value: rt.user?.screen_name || '[deleted]' }); result.push({ field: 'retweeted_text', value: rt.text_raw || strip(rt.text || '') }); } return result; }

variables.name: id
variables.help: Post ID (numeric idstr or mblogid from URL)
